title: Cobblemon: Infinite Rare Candy
description: A pink rare candy that allows you to level up your Pokemon instantly without the risk of it being consumed. It is Radical Cobblemon Trainers compatible!
body:
### Features

🔄 Infinite Use: The candy is never consumed when used

🎨 Custom Texture: Uses included pink candy sprite

🚫 No World Spawns: Only obtainable via creative/commands/crafting

🔒 Owner Protection: Can only be used on your own Pokémon

📊 Level Cap Aware: Won't try to level Pokémon beyond 100

⚙️ RCT Mod Compatible: Will respect the players current level cap

⭐ Custom Crafting Recipe:

    DND, D = Diamond

    NRN, N = Nether Star

    DND  R = Rare Candy

### Commands

/give @p infiniterarecandy:infinite_rare_candy

### Known Issues

None.

### Got a suggestion or want to report an issue?

Send me a message on discord @p.aradig.m

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This mod was inspired by the YouTuber, Pokemon Challenges (pChal), who decided using infinite rare candies in his nuzelocks was optimal for the viewers experience. With Radical Cobblemon Trainers in mind, this mod allows you to skip the grind and get right into the action.

**Radical Cobblemon Trainers (based off version 0.17.2 beta) is not required for this mod to work, but it is 100% compatible**
